summary: Official API Integration Layer (Phase 38) testing complete: Backend 13/13 tests passed (100%). Frontend Integration Status page verified with all 4 integration cards displaying correctly. All API clients (Meta, CJ, AliExpress) show not_configured status with estimation fallback. TikTok shows healthy with live mode via public scraper.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/data-integration/integration-health returns health for all 4 sources
Backend: Each source reports status, credential_detected, mode, and message
Backend: AliExpress shows not_configured when no keys set
Backend: CJ shows not_configured when no key set
Backend: Meta shows not_configured when no token set
Backend: TikTok shows healthy with live mode (public scraper)
Backend: POST /api/data-integration/enrich/{product_id} uses 4-step fallback chain
Backend: Enrichment returns sources_status showing which method was used per source
Backend: POST /api/data-integration/run-ingestion starts background ingestion
Backend: GET /api/data-integration/ingestion-status returns confidence_breakdown
Backend: GET /api/data-integration/source-health returns pull history
Backend: System Health Dashboard uses official client health checks for API integrations
Frontend: Integration Status page at /admin/integrations loads correctly
Frontend: Shows 4 integration cards (AliExpress, CJ Dropshipping, Meta Ad Library, TikTok)
Frontend: Summary bar shows Total Products, Live Data, Estimated, Not Enriched counts
Frontend: TikTok card shows 'Healthy' badge and 'Live Data' mode
Frontend: Other 3 cards show 'No Credentials' badge and 'Estimated' mode
Frontend: Setup guide section shows .env variable names and credential sources
Frontend: Sidebar navigation shows 'Integrations' link in admin section
Frontend: Run Ingestion button triggers background ingestion
Frontend: Refresh button available for status refresh
Frontend: Source Pull History table shows per-source success rates
context_for_next_testing_agent: Official API Integration Layer verified. Integration health endpoint shows all 4 sources. No API keys are configured (expected) - AliExpress/CJ/Meta all fall back to estimation. TikTok scraper returns live data. Frontend Integration Status page at /admin/integrations shows all data correctly. Summary: 139 total products, 0 live, 16 estimated, 123 not enriched. Source pull history shows 100% success for all methods.

Frontend_Integration_Status_Page.setup_guide: Shows .env variable names and credential URLs
